name: POV Style
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro in POV perspective, first-person view showing product use, natural movement mimicking real user experience, slight micro-shakes, realistic handheld movement, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
body_language_block: natural body movement from POV perspective, authentic user experience simulation, casual realistic movement patterns, genuine first-person energy
timing_block: POV experience 5-8 seconds, product interaction 3-5 seconds, result reveal 2-3 seconds, natural experiential pacing
expression_block: natural expressions from POV perspective, authentic user experience emotions, genuine first-person reactions, believable POV energy
platform_block: realistic TikTok POV style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic first-person experience pacing, relatable user journey vibe
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
